channel.title: Recording on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Recording on Nature Works

item.title: Biological recording workshop
item.description:
Clare Flynn ran a fantastic wildlife recording workshop at The People’s Orchard in St Dogmaels, here are my notes to my future self

West Wales Biodiversity Information Centre (WWBIC), made up of Pembrokeshire, Ceredigion & Carmarthen. http://localhost:1313/blog/biological-recording-workshop/
